message:
test(tui): Add comprehensive unit tests for TUI app infrastructure (+482 lines)

Add extensive test coverage for the terminal UI application layer:

Terminal backend tests:
- test_backend_size_defaults: Verify 80x24 default dimensions
- test_backend_size_from_env: Test COLUMNS/LINES environment variable parsing
- test_backend_size_minimum_enforced: Validate 40x12 minimum size enforcement
- test_backend_size_invalid_env: Test fallback on invalid env values

Buffer rendering tests:
- test_buffer_to_string_basic: Basic buffer-to-string conversion
- Additional buffer manipulation and rendering verification

These tests ensure the TUI infrastructure handles various terminal
configurations correctly and degrades gracefully with invalid inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
